text: Moving from the anticipation of the empty conference room to the vivid R+D exhibition space, I feel a transformation within myself. The promise of new knowledge and interaction in the first image gives way to intellectual curiosity as I stand before these vibrant and expressive walls, pondering how rapidly human ingenuity both divides and connects us. There’s excitement here, a sense of possibility and inquiry, and I am drawn into reflection about progress, community, and our presence in shared spaces.
